title: PRISM-IR Mobile Command Schema
description: Intermediate representation schema for Mobile Workdesk commands. Bridges natural language input to executable primitives.

command.description: The action verb to execute (e.g., open, close, navigate, execute, search, toggle)

target.description: The object or primitive the command operates on (e.g., terminal, file, pane, notification)

arguments.description: Key-value parameters for the command execution

confidence.description: Confidence score from the command interpreter (0.0 = no confidence, 1.0 = certain)

alternatives.description: Alternative interpretations when confidence is low

reason.description: Why this alternative interpretation was generated

raw_input.description: The original user input that generated this IR

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the command was parsed

metadata.description: Additional metadata for debugging and telemetry
